brief_justification: Correct answer (B) with valid reasoning; goes one level beyond surface by constructing a full schedule table showing all time slots; no explicit self-monitoring or bias checking; verifies by showing all other slots are occupied and field closes after 10pm; presents answer with certainty, no uncertainty acknowledged; implicitly rejects alternatives by showing they're occupied but doesn't explicitly discuss why each option fails; full derivation trail with clear table showing every time slot and its status.
